title: Dragon Adoption Application
text:
## Dragon Adoption Application

Applicant name: {person}

Desired dragon: {adjective}, {color}, and comfortable around {plural noun}.

Do you have space in your {place} for {number} fireproof beds and one chewable {object}?

If the dragon begins {verb ending in -ing}, will you {verb} or call a licensed {job}?

Preferred diet: {food}, roasted {noun}, and occasional {animal} treats.

Reason for adoption: feeling {emotion} and wanting a {adjective} friend with a {color} {clothing item} and {number} hobbies.
